display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity battles featuring actress Jenna Fischer, actor Oliver Hudson, figure skater Johnny Weir and gymnast Gabby Douglas.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A man from New York returns to finish his game; a woman from California plays for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A California couple faces a board with 13 $1 million cases.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Jabarri, Lake, Christine, and Mariah.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties Ann and Robin go up against newlyweds DJ and Allison.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Brad "The Buzzsaw" Rutter returns to face off with a writer from Los Angeles, a university student and a recovering attorney from Hawaii.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Cousins Travis and Michael face the wall; they are construction workers from Willow Wood, Ohio, and love to lend a helping hand to those in need; these cousins attempt to walk away with a massive payout.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Dallas, Texas; Murrieta, Calif., and Solana Beach, Calif.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Venkataram Family vs. Stewart Family.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Friends Priscilla and Hosea battle Liz and Lakenya.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Monalisa, Donna, Lauren and Justus.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.desc: Celebrity battles featuring TV personality Ross Mathews, actress Vivica A. Fox, TV personality Kelly Osbourne and actor Matt McGorry.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A man from Pakistan plays for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A man from Delaware plays for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Gianna, Nicolas, Suzy, and Donivan.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: BFFs Dana and Lauren take on couple Genesis and Miyah.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chaser James "The High Roller" Holzhauer battles against a murder mystery enthusiast, a veterinary pathologist, and a Michigan local whose irrational fear includes floating heads.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: KD, a church worship director, and CJ, a criminal investigator, are a married couple from Covington, Ga., who are known locally as community heroes; they face the wall, hoping to walk away with millions.

programme.title: Live From the PGA Championship
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding the PGA Championship focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: PGA Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Bob Tway catches Greg Norman in the final round after trailing by four strokes to win the 1986 PGA Championship.

programme.title: Live From the PGA Championship
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding the PGA Championship focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: PGA Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Payne Stewart outlasts three challengers to win the 1989 PGA Championship by one stroke.

programme.title: PGA Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Tiger Woods returns to rare form with a five stroke victory over Shaun Micheel at the 88th PGA Championship at Medinah Country Club. The win marks Woods' 3rd PGA Championship and the 12th major of his career.

programme.title: Live From the PGA Championship
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding the PGA Championship focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: Live From the PGA Championship
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding the PGA Championship focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Jimmy Walker shares tips that helped him become a major champion, specializing on and around the green. Jimmy discusses the keys to greenside bunker play, teaches how to chip it close with the wedge, and reveals how an alignment rod helps sink putts.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Major champion Jimmy Walker breaks down all things full swing to show what has led him to multiple victories on the PGA TOUR. He highlights the trials, tribulations, and ultimately the rewards of implementing major swing changes.

programme.title: Live: Ladies Euro Tour Golf
programme.desc: Golfing action from the Ladies Euro Tour.

programme.title: Ladies Euro Tour Golf
programme.desc: Golfing action from the Ladies Euro Tour.

programme.title: Live: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Golfing action from the LPGA Tour.

programme.title: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Golfing action from the LPGA Tour.

programme.title: Live From the PGA Championship
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding the PGA Championship focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Rangers Shorts
programme.desc: Rangers Shorts '25-'26.

programme.title: Best of Rangers
programme.desc: From Nov. 07, 2025.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: The Netherlands remain the greatest football nation never to win the World Cup, Florian Wirtz is Germany's latest superstar, and we hear from some referees officiating in the biggest tournament of their lives.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Scotland will bring the Tartan Army to North America, Curaçao will be the tiniest nation at the Finals, and Memphis Depay will bid to add to his record haul of goals for the Netherlands.

programme.title: Best of the Knicks
programme.desc: From Nov. 24, 2025.

programme.title: Best of the Knicks
programme.desc: From Nov. 26, 2025.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance features top-ranked fighters, up and coming fighters, intense action and footage from some of the biggest names in combat sports and exclusive content spanning MMA, boxing, kickboxing, bare knuckle boxing, muay thai and more.

programme.desc: From Nov. 24, 2025.

programme.title: Rangers Classics
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Patrick Division Semifinals. From April 5, 1990.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: Following the real daily life of a local card shop based in Lancaster, Pa. Go behind-the-scenes of sports cards and memorabilia through the eyes of a small, but successful, family-owned business.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: To celebrate Matt Strahm's return to the Royals, he is joined by some of MLB's biggest collectors in KC. Justin Topa and Mick Abel join Matt for a baseball card pack draft, and Bobby Witt Jr. tries to identify when the photos on his cards were taken.

programme.title: Rangers Classics
programme.desc: Game 5 of the Patrick Division Semifinals. From April 13, 1990.

programme.title: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: NESN Rundown
programme.desc: The best segments from today's NESN podcasts.

programme.title: 310 to Left
programme.desc: Tom Caron and Alex Spier discuss Red Sox topics, including prospects, front office matters and future team expectations.

programme.title: NESN Rundown
programme.desc: The best segments from today's NESN podcasts.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: UMass Sports Insider
programme.desc: The official show of UMass Athletics; a look at the happenings of athletics and its coaches and student-athletes, featuring football, men's and women's basketball, hockey and more of the school's varsity sports.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Live: Boston Has Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Boston Has Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Red Sox Report
programme.desc: David Ortiz visits Cooperstown to tour the museum ahead of his induction into the Baseball Hall of Fame in July.

programme.title: Red Sox Report
programme.desc: Following David Ortiz from Santo Domingo in January to Cooperstown in July as he's elected and then inducted into the Baseball Hall of Fame.

programme.title: 310 to Left
programme.desc: Hosts Tom Caron and Alex Spier go deep on all things Red Sox: prospects, the front office, and what to expect in the coming weeks and months.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Phillies play the Red Sox as they continue their series at Fenway Park. Andrew Painter starts for Philadelphia while Sonny Gray starts for Boston. Kyle Schwarber leads the club in home runs. The teams meet in this key MLB matchup.

programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.desc: Dominic Zvada kicked a 31-yard field goal as time expired to lift the 18th-ranked Wolverines to a 24-22 win over the Wildcats at Wrigley Field. From Nov. 15, 2025.

programme.desc: From Michigan Stadium in Ann Arbor, Mich.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Learn about Ava Carroll's journey to Washington. See how head coach Jake Boss Jr.'s father has continued to support him and the Michigan State baseball program. Get to know Wisconsin's Hilary and Addison Blomberg.

programme.desc: Replays of the best action from Big Ten contests.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: See how Roch Cholowsky is chasing a storybook ending to his collegiate career with UCLA. Get to know Michigan baseball's Elie Kligman. Learn how Maryland's Aubrey Wurst is pursuing a future in broadcast journalism.

programme.desc: Jai Patel kicked the game-winning field goal as time expired to lift the Scarlet Knights to a 27-24 victory over the Boilermakers. From Oct. 25, 2025.

programme.desc: See how Roch Cholowsky is chasing a storybook ending to his collegiate career with UCLA. Get to know Michigan baseball's Elie Kligman. Learn how Maryland's Aubrey Wurst is pursuing a future in broadcast journalism.

programme.title: UCLA Football Classic
programme.desc: Nico Iamaleava passed for two touchdowns and ran in 3 more scores to lead the Bruins to a 42-37 upset victory over the 7th-ranked Nittany Lions. From Oct. 4, 2025.

programme.desc: Mateen Bhaghani kicked a 23-yard field goal with two seconds remaining to lift the Bruins to a 20-17 victory over the Terrapins. From Oct. 18, 2025.

programme.title: College Golf
programme.desc: Coverage of college golf action.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Lizette Salas sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss her story as a first-generation college graduate, daughter of Mexican immigrants, and member of USC's Women's Golf Team. She shares her experience and struggles of belonging in the world of golf while competing at the top of the sport, ultimately becoming a trailblazer paving the way for generations to come.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Duke Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Duke Blue Devils.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Filmmaker Billy Corben documents the rise to prominence of the college football program at the University of Miami.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The University of Miami's football program tries to recover from the devastation left by NCAA sanctions and scandals.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Cavaliers (10-2) and Blue Devils (7-5) compete for the ACC championship. Virginia defeated Duke 34-17 in November. Cavaliers senior J'Mari Taylor has rushed for 14 touchdowns. Blue Devils sophomore Darian Mensah boasts 28 touchdown passes.

programme.title: Live: ACC PM
programme.desc: Tune into ACC Network's daily news and information show - with the biggest storylines and best guests from across the ACC.

programme.title: Live: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Doak Field in Raleigh, N.C.
